tweet_text: Whoa, just caught wind of the latest in AI agents—2026 is kicking off with autonomous systems that can negotiate crypto trades in real-time, blending neural nets with blockchain smarts. Imagine your AI handling DeFi yields while you sleep! Mind-blowing potential for everyday investors. What's your take on AI-driven crypto? #AI #Crypto
